attributes.action: Do not join the war in Iran as of February 2026.
attributes.additional_details: I understand Sir Keir Starter has publicly stated that he will not join any offensive action regarding this war, but I believe getting involved in any way is reckless and disregarding of our nation. Our children have their whole lives ahead of them. It would be immoral to strip them of a future. Some are terrified and extremely disheartened by the thought of possibly striking WW3 into action. We get taught history at school so that we do not repeat it. Please take my petition into consideration.
attributes.background: I demand that the Government do not involve themselves in the current war between the United States and Iran. Even taking defensive action would put our country at risk, and would make us a high target for attack.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
